title: Beijing Launches Ten Policies for Intelligent Agents: From the Control Layer Engineering to Individual Companies, a Blueprint for an Agent Economy is Unveiled
excerpt: A policy document not too long, which was implemented today in Beijing, has incorporated a series of terms that only recently appeared in academic papers and te
content_html:
A policy document not too long, which was implemented today in Beijing, has incorporated a series of terms that only recently appeared in academic papers and technical jargon into official government documents. This document, "Several Measures for Accelerating the Development of Intelligent Agents in Beijing," consists of ten points, including Agentic AI, Harness Engineering, AI OS, FDE, OPC, Token Economy, TaaS, AaaS, RaaS, Token Factory, and AIP. Especially when "Harness Engineering" is placed as the second point, the grand blueprint of the intelligent agent economy has, for the first time, gained a clear outline at the policy level.

The first point focuses on foundational models, with key wording being "continuously improve the actual task completion ability of large models." In recent years, large models were compared based on Benchmark scores, but when agents start working, they often only receive a vague goal, needing to complete the information themselves, break down the plan, adjust tools, read feedback, and modify the route until the result appears. There's a harsh calculation here: assuming an agent performs 100 steps continuously, with a 99% accuracy rate per step, the probability of getting everything right is only about 36.6%; even if the accuracy is increased to 99.9%, the chance of completing the whole process is only about 90.5%. Therefore, the practical value of an agent is more like a multiplication — model capability multiplied by long-term reliability, multiplied by environmental operability, and then multiplied by result verifiability. If any of these approaches zero, the total value also approaches zero. Frontier evaluations have also shifted in this direction, such as METR's Task Completion Time Horizon, which directly tests how long it takes for an agent to independently complete a task that would otherwise require a human expert, which also explains why code became the first area where agents exploded: it is highly digital, rollback-able, and verifiable.

The second point translates "Harness Engineering" as "Harness Engineering," requiring optimization around context engineering, task persistence, multi-agent collaboration, and system scalability to build a common foundation. The model provides potential capabilities, but whether these can be consistently delivered depends on the entire surrounding system — how to select context, how to adjust tools, how to break tasks down, how to control permissions, how to store states, how to retry after failure, and who verifies the results. These together form the "Harness." A paper from April this year, "Agentic Harness Engineering," demonstrated that by keeping the base model unchanged and only iterating on tools, middleware, long-term memory, and observable systems outside the model, after ten rounds, the Pass@1 score on Terminal-Bench2 increased from 69.7% to 77.0%, and there was a 5.1 to 10.1 percentage point improvement in other model families, with the gains mainly coming from tools, middleware, and long-term memory rather than just changing the system prompt. The policy also mentions skill markets, software stores, and AIP interoperability standards — in the future, many software users will become agents, and the competition will not only be about App Store rankings, but also about how agents discover them and make them default skills.

The third point encourages restructuring the underlying architecture based on intelligent agents, with the core being "demand intelligence." Software intelligence is divided into three layers: functional intelligence adds a generation button to a specific node; process intelligence connects several steps in a fixed workflow; demand intelligence allows the user to simply state the desired outcome, and the system automatically determines the steps, calls models and skills, connects software, and finds approvals, taking full responsibility for the final result. This is reflected in the concept of "super software" — its strength lies not in having more functions, but in crossing existing software boundaries, understanding requirements comprehensively, and recombining distributed capabilities. This point specifically mentions FDE (Frontier Deployment Engineer): entering customer sites, breaking down processes, connecting systems, and cleaning data, then bringing daily new problems back to the product. Five criteria determine benchmark scenarios — task frequency, manual cost, digitization level, result verifiability, and error reversibility. The more of these conditions are met, the more likely real ROI will be achieved. This also explains why the policy chose science, healthcare, education, government affairs, manufacturing, and culture.

The fourth point moves from software to terminals, requiring deep embedding of agents into phones, glasses, earphones, wearables, robots, and cars, promoting the "five-in-one integration of chip, model, cloud, and terminal usage." Terminal agents need continuous environmental perception, user status understanding, and long-term context remembering, making decisions at the right time and executing through devices. Sensors allow them to perceive the world, device identity and personal data help them understand "who they are," while the operating system and actuators enable them to change the world. The edge handles low-latency perception, identity verification, private data, and frequent simple tasks, while the cloud manages complex planning and reasoning. Device-to-device task state sharing allows one task to begin on earphones, continue on a phone, and be completed on a car or computer. The document also includes new products that meet the criteria in home appliance trade-in and smart product purchase programs, directly stimulating demand side.

The fifth point is the most direct for ordinary people: supporting innovative entrepreneurship models represented by OPC (One-Person Company). Behind it is the loosening of enterprise boundaries — Coase explained in 1937 why companies exist because internal coordination is cheaper than repeatedly going to the market to find people, negotiate, sign contracts, and supervise. However, agents are simultaneously lowering execution costs and coordination costs, allowing knowledge work that previously required multiple positions — writing code, designing, handling customers, responding to inquiries, and managing reports — to be connected by one person using multiple agents, thus reducing the minimum viable scale of enterprises. The policy doesn't just issue a slogan but continues with flexible computing power, professional incubation, entrepreneurial guidance, technology finance, intellectual property, policy consultation, OPC communities, full-cycle service stations, supply-demand matching, and convenient registration, effectively moving internal company back-end capabilities to the social public service layer. For individuals who want to seize opportunities, what they truly need are three assets: industry judgment, customer trust, and a reusable agent system.

The sixth point discusses the Token economy. Agents perform dynamic tasks with uncertain length, context, reasoning rounds, number of tools, and retries, making it common to spend 2 billion Tokens without achieving anything. This makes Tokens suitable as a cost measurement unit but difficult as a value currency. While the policy mentions Token service quality evaluation and billing standards, it also encourages establishing an evaluation system based on intelligent quality, usage volume, and conversion efficiency, and writes the heaviest sentence in the entire document: "Encouraging innovation entities to shift from billing by Token consumption to value-based billing." Three business models correspond to three value levels: TaaS sells basic Tokens and inference supply, competing on price, speed, stability, and model quality; AaaS packages models, tools, and Harness into capable agents, selling one capability; RaaS sells results directly, with customers focusing only on whether the contract is signed, the code is fixed, or the lead is converted. The higher up, the further away from Tokens and closer to customer value, but RaaS becomes much more difficult, as suppliers must bear the responsibility of task failure, repeated execution, cost fluctuations, quality acceptance, and compensation. Afterward, agent companies should calculate a new account called Cost per Successful Task (cost per successful task), and then Value per Successful Task (value per successful task). The document also proposes including eligible Token new products in small and medium enterprise service coupons, exploring Token coupons and intelligent agent service coupons, using Token factories to solve supply, service coupons to activate demand, and value-based billing to maintain the cycle.

The seventh point discusses security. Chatbots produce content, but agents gain action rights, able to edit code, initiate payments, control devices, and communicate on behalf of users, expanding risks from "saying something wrong" to "doing something wrong." Agent security must address at least five issues simultaneously: incorrect understanding of goals, permission overreach, prompt injection manipulation, pollution of long-term memory, and rapid amplification of errors between multiple agents. Connecting to third-party tools and skills also means that any plugin or interface failure can infiltrate the core along the task chain. The document's security measures have moved from content review to runtime governance; in May this year, the Cyberspace Administration of China and other departments issued the "Opinions on the Standardized Application and Innovative Development of Intelligent Agents," proposing to define the boundaries of decisions limited to oneself, authorized decisions, and autonomous decisions. Categorized regulation may actually help the industry accelerate — low-risk tasks can be tested quickly and launched, while high-risk tasks require strict inspection and manual confirmation. Here, safety is both a constraint and a market access certificate.

The eighth point implements the "Galaxy Computing Corridor" project, building a new computing infrastructure for high-frequency, low-latency demands of intelligent agents, promoting the integration of computing networks with 5G-A, 6G, and F5G, and tapping into existing computing power, aggregating scattered computing power through "zero savings and lump sum." Training large models is a centralized big project, but agent inference is like a long-running production network, responding to massive tasks around the clock, with loads fluctuating dramatically due to real business. Future scheduling will not only involve GPUs, but also different chips, models, data permissions, and network conditions across clouds, edges, and ends. The value of Galaxy Computing Corridor is similar to building a computing logistics system for intelligent production, creating opportunities for computing routing, heterogeneous scheduling, and edge computing. The document also supports banks and insurance institutions in developing financial products to support the implementation of intelligent agents, as the most valuable asset of agent companies in their early stage is code, data, and contracts, while the most important new asset in the new era is called "task trajectory" — a complete chain of goals, plans, actions, observations, corrections, and results, which can be used for training models, optimizing Harness, discovering security vulnerabilities, and analyzing business processes.

The ninth point promotes open source and openness, proposing the construction of a high-level China-South Asian Cooperation Center for AI applications, researching export paths for large models and intelligent agents for each country, and building a globally influential open-source community. The intelligent agent era especially needs open source and protocols, as it is inherently interconnected, and the ecological network effect is extremely strong — once a new skill is integrated, all compatible protocol agents may gain this capability, and the more agents there are, the more developers are willing to provide skills, the more skills there are, the more useful agents become. Whoever's protocol is widely adopted controls the development entry and ecological voice. The document specifically mentions evaluating open-source contributions, as open source is truly expensive in terms of long-term maintenance and community operations. The export part faces more complex privacy, responsibility, and access issues because intelligent agents are deeply embedded in local economies, hence the proposal for "one country, one strategy."

The tenth point addresses guarantees, coordinating national and municipal fiscal funds, government investment funds, and market-oriented funds to support technical breakthroughs, common platforms, and demonstration applications that meet the criteria. This policy covers a wide range, spilling over from a single technology industry to scientific research, software, manufacturing, consumer goods, entrepreneurship, finance, regulation, talent, and international cooperation. The intelligent agent era represents a direct capability reassessment for every individual and company: most jobs will not disappear overnight, but more realistically, they will be broken down into dozens of tasks, with repetitive, procedural, and easily verifiable parts being taken over by agents first; those who can only complete intermediate steps, cannot judge results, and cannot take responsibility for final delivery will face increasing pressure. Opportunities lie precisely in the redistribution of tasks and the revaluation of capabilities — in the past, it took capital, teams, and complex management to create a company, but now, with a mature agent system, it's possible to start from a very small real task and scale up. However, agents won't automatically bring success — they will only amplify a person's goals, judgments, expertise, and execution system together.

sentences.en: A policy document not too long, which was implemented today in Beijing, has incorporated a series of terms that only recently appeared in academic papers and technical jargon into official government documents.
sentences.zh: 今天在北京实施的一份不太长的政策文件，将一系列最近才出现在学术论文和技术术语中的术语纳入了政府官方文件。

sentences.en: This document, "Several Measures for Accelerating the Development of Intelligent Agents in Beijing," consists of ten points, including Agentic AI, Harness Engineering, AI OS, FDE, OPC, Token Economy, TaaS, AaaS, RaaS, Token Factory, and AIP.
sentences.zh: 这份《加快北京市智能体发展的若干措施》包括Agentic AI、Harness Engineering、AI OS、FDE、OPC、Token Economy、TaaS、AaaS、RaaS、Token Factory、AIP等十点。

sentences.en: Especially when "Harness Engineering" is placed as the second point, the grand blueprint of the intelligent agent economy has, for the first time, gained a clear outline at the policy level.
sentences.zh: 尤其是当“线控工程”被置于第二点时，智能体经济的宏伟蓝图首次在政策层面有了清晰的轮廓。

sentences.zh: 这些共同构成了“线束”。

sentences.zh: 今年4月的一篇论文《Agentic Harness Engineering》表明，保持基础模型不变，只迭代模型外的工具、中间件、长期记忆和可观察系统，十轮后，Terminal-Bench2的Pass@1分数从69.7%提高到77.0%，其他模型家族也有5.1到10.1个百分点的提升，收益主要来自于工具、中间件和长期记忆而不仅仅是改变系统提示符。

sentences.en: The policy also mentions skill markets, software stores, and AIP interoperability standards — in the future, many software users will become agents, and the competition will not only be about App Store rankings, but also about how agents discover them and make them default skills.
sentences.zh: 政策还提到了技能市场、软件商店、AIP互操作标准——未来，很多软件用户将成为代理商，竞争的不仅仅是App Store排名，还有代理商如何发现他们并使其成为默认技能。

blocks.html_en: The third point encourages restructuring the underlying architecture based on intelligent agents, with the core being "demand intelligence." Software intelligence is divided into three layers: functional intelligence adds a generation button to a specific node; process intelligence connects several steps in a fixed workflow; demand intelligence allows the user to simply state the desired outcome, and the system automatically determines the steps, calls models and skills, connects software, and finds approvals, taking full responsibility for the final result. This is reflected in the concept of "super software" — its strength lies not in having more functions, but in crossing existing software boundaries, understanding requirements comprehensively, and recombining distributed capabilities. This point specifically mentions FDE (Frontier Deployment Engineer): entering customer sites, breaking down processes, connecting systems, and cleaning data, then bringing daily new problems back to the product. Five criteria determine benchmark scenarios — task frequency, manual cost, digitization level, result verifiability, and error reversibility. The more of these conditions are met, the more likely real ROI will be achieved. This also explains why the policy chose science, healthcare, education, government affairs, manufacturing, and culture.

sentences.en: The third point encourages restructuring the underlying architecture based on intelligent agents, with the core being "demand intelligence."
sentences.zh: 第三点鼓励基于智能代理重构底层架构，核心是“需求智能”。

sentences.en: Software intelligence is divided into three layers: functional intelligence adds a generation button to a specific node; process intelligence connects several steps in a fixed workflow; demand intelligence allows the user to simply state the desired outcome, and the system automatically determines the steps, calls models and skills, connects software, and finds approvals, taking full responsibility for the final result.
sentences.zh: 软件智能分为三层：功能智能为特定节点添加生成按钮；流程智能将固定工作流程中的多个步骤连接起来；需求智能让用户简单说出想要的结果，系统自动确定步骤、调用模型和技能、连接软件、寻求批准，对最终结果承担全部责任。

sentences.en: This is reflected in the concept of "super software" — its strength lies not in having more functions, but in crossing existing software boundaries, understanding requirements comprehensively, and recombining distributed capabilities.
sentences.zh: 这体现在“超级软件”的概念上——它的优势不在于拥有更多的功能，而在于跨越现有软件边界、全面理解需求、重新组合分布式能力。

sentences.en: This point specifically mentions FDE (Frontier Deployment Engineer): entering customer sites, breaking down processes, connecting systems, and cleaning data, then bringing daily new problems back to the product.
sentences.zh: 这一点特别提到了FDE（前沿部署工程师）：进入客户现场，分解流程，连接系统，清洗数据，然后将每天的新问题带回到产品中。

sentences.en: Five criteria determine benchmark scenarios — task frequency, manual cost, digitization level, result verifiability, and error reversibility.
sentences.zh: 五个标准决定基准场景——任务频率、人工成本、数字化水平、结果可验证性和错误可逆性。

sentences.en: The more of these conditions are met, the more likely real ROI will be achieved.
sentences.zh: 这些条件满足得越多，实现实际投资回报率的可能性就越大。

sentences.en: This also explains why the policy chose science, healthcare, education, government affairs, manufacturing, and culture.
sentences.zh: 这也解释了为什么政策选择了科学、医疗、教育、政务、制造、文化。

blocks.html_en: The fourth point moves from software to terminals, requiring deep embedding of agents into phones, glasses, earphones, wearables, robots, and cars, promoting the "five-in-one integration of chip, model, cloud, and terminal usage." Terminal agents need continuous environmental perception, user status understanding, and long-term context remembering, making decisions at the right time and executing through devices. Sensors allow them to perceive the world, device identity and personal data help them understand "who they are," while the operating system and actuators enable them to change the world. The edge handles low-latency perception, identity verification, private data, and frequent simple tasks, while the cloud manages complex planning and reasoning. Device-to-device task state sharing allows one task to begin on earphones, continue on a phone, and be completed on a car or computer. The document also includes new products that meet the criteria in home appliance trade-in and smart product purchase programs, directly stimulating demand side.

sentences.en: The fourth point moves from software to terminals, requiring deep embedding of agents into phones, glasses, earphones, wearables, robots, and cars, promoting the "five-in-one integration of chip, model, cloud, and terminal usage."
sentences.zh: 第四点从软件转向终端，要求智能体深度嵌入手机、眼镜、耳机、可穿戴设备、机器人、汽车等领域，推动“芯片、模型、云、终端五合一”。

sentences.en: Terminal agents need continuous environmental perception, user status understanding, and long-term context remembering, making decisions at the right time and executing through devices.
sentences.zh: 终端代理需要持续的环境感知、用户状态理解以及长期的上下文记忆，在正确的时间做出决策并通过设备执行。

sentences.en: Sensors allow them to perceive the world, device identity and personal data help them understand "who they are," while the operating system and actuators enable them to change the world.
sentences.zh: 传感器使他们能够感知世界，设备身份和个人数据帮助他们了解“他们是谁”，而操作系统和执行器使他们能够改变世界。

sentences.en: The edge handles low-latency perception, identity verification, private data, and frequent simple tasks, while the cloud manages complex planning and reasoning.
sentences.zh: 边缘处理低延迟感知、身份验证、私有数据和频繁的简单任务，而云则管理复杂的规划和推理。

sentences.en: Device-to-device task state sharing allows one task to begin on earphones, continue on a phone, and be completed on a car or computer.
sentences.zh: 设备到设备的任务状态共享允许一项任务在耳机上开始，在电话上继续，并在汽车或计算机上完成。

sentences.en: The document also includes new products that meet the criteria in home appliance trade-in and smart product purchase programs, directly stimulating demand side.
sentences.zh: 该文件还将符合条件的新产品纳入家电以旧换新和智能产品采购计划，直接刺激需求面。

blocks.html_en: The fifth point is the most direct for ordinary people: supporting innovative entrepreneurship models represented by OPC (One-Person Company). Behind it is the loosening of enterprise boundaries — Coase explained in 1937 why companies exist because internal coordination is cheaper than repeatedly going to the market to find people, negotiate, sign contracts, and supervise. However, agents are simultaneously lowering execution costs and coordination costs, allowing knowledge work that previously required multiple positions — writing code, designing, handling customers, responding to inquiries, and managing reports — to be connected by one person using multiple agents, thus reducing the minimum viable scale of enterprises. The policy doesn't just issue a slogan but continues with flexible computing power, professional incubation, entrepreneurial guidance, technology finance, intellectual property, policy consultation, OPC communities, full-cycle service stations, supply-demand matching, and convenient registration, effectively moving internal company back-end capabilities to the social public service layer. For individuals who want to seize opportunities, what they truly need are three assets: industry judgment, customer trust, and a reusable agent system.

sentences.en: The fifth point is the most direct for ordinary people: supporting innovative entrepreneurship models represented by OPC (One-Person Company).
sentences.zh: 第五点对于老百姓来说是最直接的：支持以OPC（One-Person Company）为代表的创新创业模式。

sentences.en: Behind it is the loosening of enterprise boundaries — Coase explained in 1937 why companies exist because internal coordination is cheaper than repeatedly going to the market to find people, negotiate, sign contracts, and supervise.
sentences.zh: 其背后是企业边界的松动——科斯在1937年解释了公司存在的原因，因为内部协调比反复去市场找人、谈判、签订合同和监督要便宜。

sentences.en: However, agents are simultaneously lowering execution costs and coordination costs, allowing knowledge work that previously required multiple positions — writing code, designing, handling customers, responding to inquiries, and managing reports — to be connected by one person using multiple agents, thus reducing the minimum viable scale of enterprises.
sentences.zh: 然而，代理同时降低了执行成本和协调成本，使得以前需要多个岗位的知识工作——编写代码、设计、处理客户、回复查询、管理报告——可以由一个人使用多个代理连接起来，从而缩小了企业的最小可行规模。

sentences.en: The policy doesn't just issue a slogan but continues with flexible computing power, professional incubation, entrepreneurial guidance, technology finance, intellectual property, policy consultation, OPC communities, full-cycle service stations, supply-demand matching, and convenient registration, effectively moving internal company back-end capabilities to the social public service layer.
sentences.zh: 该政策不仅仅是一句口号，而是从灵活算力、专业孵化、创业引导、科技金融、知识产权、政策咨询、OPC社区、全周期服务站、供需匹配、便捷注册等方面延续，有效将企业内部后端能力转移到社会公共服务层。

sentences.en: For individuals who want to seize opportunities, what they truly need are three assets: industry judgment, customer trust, and a reusable agent system.
sentences.zh: 对于想要抓住机会的个人来说，他们真正需要的是三项资产：行业判断、客户信任和可重用的代理系统。

blocks.html_en: The sixth point discusses the Token economy. Agents perform dynamic tasks with uncertain length, context, reasoning rounds, number of tools, and retries, making it common to spend 2 billion Tokens without achieving anything. This makes Tokens suitable as a cost measurement unit but difficult as a value currency. While the policy mentions Token service quality evaluation and billing standards, it also encourages establishing an evaluation system based on intelligent quality, usage volume, and conversion efficiency, and writes the heaviest sentence in the entire document: "Encouraging innovation entities to shift from billing by Token consumption to value-based billing." Three business models correspond to three value levels: TaaS sells basic Tokens and inference supply, competing on price, speed, stability, and model quality; AaaS packages models, tools, and Harness into capable agents, selling one capability; RaaS sells results directly, with customers focusing only on whether the contract is signed, the code is fixed, or the lead is converted. The higher up, the further away from Tokens and closer to customer value, but RaaS becomes much more difficult, as suppliers must bear the responsibility of task failure, repeated execution, cost fluctuations, quality acceptance, and compensation. Afterward, agent companies should calculate a new account called Cost per Successful Task (cost per successful task), and then Value per Successful Task (value per successful task). The document also proposes including eligible Token new products in small and medium enterprise service coupons, exploring Token coupons and intelligent agent service coupons, using Token factories to solve supply, service coupons to activate demand, and value-based billing to maintain the cycle.

sentences.en: The sixth point discusses the Token economy.
sentences.zh: 第六点讨论Token经济。

sentences.en: Agents perform dynamic tasks with uncertain length, context, reasoning rounds, number of tools, and retries, making it common to spend 2 billion Tokens without achieving anything.
sentences.zh: 代理执行长度、上下文、推理轮次、工具数量和重试不确定的动态任务，因此花费 20 亿代币却没有取得任何成果的情况很常见。

sentences.en: This makes Tokens suitable as a cost measurement unit but difficult as a value currency.
sentences.zh: 这使得代币适合作为成本计量单位，但很难作为价值货币。

sentences.en: While the policy mentions Token service quality evaluation and billing standards, it also encourages establishing an evaluation system based on intelligent quality, usage volume, and conversion efficiency, and writes the heaviest sentence in the entire document: "Encouraging innovation entities to shift from billing by Token consumption to value-based billing."
sentences.zh: 政策在提到Token服务质量评估和计费标准的同时，也鼓励建立基于智能质量、使用量、转换效率的评估体系，并写下了整篇文件中最重的一句话：“鼓励创新主体从Token消耗计费转向价值计费”。

sentences.en: Three business models correspond to three value levels: TaaS sells basic Tokens and inference supply, competing on price, speed, stability, and model quality; AaaS packages models, tools, and Harness into capable agents, selling one capability; RaaS sells results directly, with customers focusing only on whether the contract is signed, the code is fixed, or the lead is converted.
sentences.zh: 三种商业模式对应三种价值层次：TaaS出售基础Token和推理供给，比价格、速度、稳定性、模型质量； AaaS 将模型、工具和 Harness 打包成有能力的代理，销售一种功能； RaaS 直接销售结果，客户只需关注是否签订了合同、是否固定了代码或是否转换了潜在客户。

sentences.en: The higher up, the further away from Tokens and closer to customer value, but RaaS becomes much more difficult, as suppliers must bear the responsibility of task failure, repeated execution, cost fluctuations, quality acceptance, and compensation.
sentences.zh: 越高，离Token越远，越接近客户价值，但RaaS就变得更加困难，因为供应商必须承担任务失败、重复执行、成本波动、质量验收和赔偿的责任。

sentences.en: Afterward, agent companies should calculate a new account called Cost per Successful Task (cost per successful task), and then Value per Successful Task (value per successful task).
sentences.zh: 之后，代理公司应该计算一个新帐户，称为Cost per Success Task（每个成功任务的成本），然后是Value per Success Task（每个成功任务的价值）。

sentences.en: The document also proposes including eligible Token new products in small and medium enterprise service coupons, exploring Token coupons and intelligent agent service coupons, using Token factories to solve supply, service coupons to activate demand, and value-based billing to maintain the cycle.
sentences.zh: 文件还提出，将符合条件的Token新产品纳入中小企业服务券，探索Token券和智能代理服务券，用Token工厂解决供给，用服务券激活需求，按价值计费维持循环。

blocks.html_en: The seventh point discusses security. Chatbots produce content, but agents gain action rights, able to edit code, initiate payments, control devices, and communicate on behalf of users, expanding risks from "saying something wrong" to "doing something wrong." Agent security must address at least five issues simultaneously: incorrect understanding of goals, permission overreach, prompt injection manipulation, pollution of long-term memory, and rapid amplification of errors between multiple agents. Connecting to third-party tools and skills also means that any plugin or interface failure can infiltrate the core along the task chain. The document's security measures have moved from content review to runtime governance; in May this year, the Cyberspace Administration of China and other departments issued the "Opinions on the Standardized Application and Innovative Development of Intelligent Agents," proposing to define the boundaries of decisions limited to oneself, authorized decisions, and autonomous decisions. Categorized regulation may actually help the industry accelerate — low-risk tasks can be tested quickly and launched, while high-risk tasks require strict inspection and manual confirmation. Here, safety is both a constraint and a market access certificate.

sentences.en: The seventh point discusses security.
sentences.zh: 第七点讨论安全性。

sentences.en: Chatbots produce content, but agents gain action rights, able to edit code, initiate payments, control devices, and communicate on behalf of users, expanding risks from "saying something wrong" to "doing something wrong."
sentences.zh: 聊天机器人生成内容，但代理获得行动权，能够编辑代码、发起付款、控制设备并代表用户进行通信，从而将风险从“说错话”扩大到“做错事”。

sentences.en: Agent security must address at least five issues simultaneously: incorrect understanding of goals, permission overreach, prompt injection manipulation, pollution of long-term memory, and rapid amplification of errors between multiple agents.
sentences.zh: 代理安全必须同时解决至少五个问题：对目标的不正确理解、权限越权、即时注入操纵、长期记忆污染以及多个代理之间错误的快速放大。

sentences.en: Connecting to third-party tools and skills also means that any plugin or interface failure can infiltrate the core along the task chain.
sentences.zh: 连接到第三方工具和技能还意味着任何插件或接口故障都可以沿着任务链渗透到核心。

sentences.en: The document's security measures have moved from content review to runtime governance; in May this year, the Cyberspace Administration of China and other departments issued the "Opinions on the Standardized Application and Innovative Development of Intelligent Agents," proposing to define the boundaries of decisions limited to oneself, authorized decisions, and autonomous decisions.
sentences.zh: 文档的安全措施已从内容审查转向运行时治理；今年5月，国家网信办等部门发布《关于智能体规范应用和创新发展的意见》，提出明确仅限于自身决策、授权决策和自主决策的界限。

sentences.en: Categorized regulation may actually help the industry accelerate — low-risk tasks can be tested quickly and launched, while high-risk tasks require strict inspection and manual confirmation.
sentences.zh: 分类监管实际上可能有助于行业加速——低风险的任务可以快速测试并上线，而高风险的任务需要严格检查和人工确认。

sentences.en: Here, safety is both a constraint and a market access certificate.
sentences.zh: 在这里，安全既是约束，又是市场准入的凭证。

blocks.html_en: The eighth point implements the "Galaxy Computing Corridor" project, building a new computing infrastructure for high-frequency, low-latency demands of intelligent agents, promoting the integration of computing networks with 5G-A, 6G, and F5G, and tapping into existing computing power, aggregating scattered computing power through "zero savings and lump sum." Training large models is a centralized big project, but agent inference is like a long-running production network, responding to massive tasks around the clock, with loads fluctuating dramatically due to real business. Future scheduling will not only involve GPUs, but also different chips, models, data permissions, and network conditions across clouds, edges, and ends. The value of Galaxy Computing Corridor is similar to building a computing logistics system for intelligent production, creating opportunities for computing routing, heterogeneous scheduling, and edge computing. The document also supports banks and insurance institutions in developing financial products to support the implementation of intelligent agents, as the most valuable asset of agent companies in their early stage is code, data, and contracts, while the most important new asset in the new era is called "task trajectory" — a complete chain of goals, plans, actions, observations, corrections, and results, which can be used for training models, optimizing Harness, discovering security vulnerabilities, and analyzing business processes.

sentences.en: The eighth point implements the "Galaxy Computing Corridor" project, building a new computing infrastructure for high-frequency, low-latency demands of intelligent agents, promoting the integration of computing networks with 5G-A, 6G, and F5G, and tapping into existing computing power, aggregating scattered computing power through "zero savings and lump sum."
sentences.zh: 第八点实施“银河计算长廊”工程，针对智能体高频、低时延需求构建新型计算基础设施，推动计算网络与5G-A、6G、F5G融合，挖掘现有算力，通过“零节省、一次性付清”聚合分散算力。

sentences.en: Training large models is a centralized big project, but agent inference is like a long-running production network, responding to massive tasks around the clock, with loads fluctuating dramatically due to real business.
sentences.zh: 训练大型模型是一个中心化的大工程，但智能体推理就像一个长期运行的生产网络，全天候响应海量任务，负载会因实际业务而大幅波动。

sentences.en: Future scheduling will not only involve GPUs, but also different chips, models, data permissions, and network conditions across clouds, edges, and ends.
sentences.zh: 未来的调度不仅涉及GPU，还涉及跨云、跨边、跨端的不同芯片、模型、数据权限、网络状况。

sentences.en: The value of Galaxy Computing Corridor is similar to building a computing logistics system for intelligent production, creating opportunities for computing routing, heterogeneous scheduling, and edge computing.
sentences.zh: 银河计算走廊的价值类似于构建智能生产的计算物流系统，为计算路由、异构调度和边缘计算创造机会。

sentences.en: The document also supports banks and insurance institutions in developing financial products to support the implementation of intelligent agents, as the most valuable asset of agent companies in their early stage is code, data, and contracts, while the most important new asset in the new era is called "task trajectory" — a complete chain of goals, plans, actions, observations, corrections, and results, which can be used for training models, optimizing Harness, discovering security vulnerabilities, and analyzing business processes.
sentences.zh: 文件还支持银行和保险机构开发支持智能代理落地的金融产品，因为代理公司早期最有价值的资产是代码、数据和合约，而新时代最重要的新资产被称为“任务轨迹”——目标、计划、行动、观察、纠正和结果的完整链条，可用于训练模型、优化Harness、发现安全漏洞、分析业务流程。

blocks.html_en: The ninth point promotes open source and openness, proposing the construction of a high-level China-South Asian Cooperation Center for AI applications, researching export paths for large models and intelligent agents for each country, and building a globally influential open-source community. The intelligent agent era especially needs open source and protocols, as it is inherently interconnected, and the ecological network effect is extremely strong — once a new skill is integrated, all compatible protocol agents may gain this capability, and the more agents there are, the more developers are willing to provide skills, the more skills there are, the more useful agents become. Whoever's protocol is widely adopted controls the development entry and ecological voice. The document specifically mentions evaluating open-source contributions, as open source is truly expensive in terms of long-term maintenance and community operations. The export part faces more complex privacy, responsibility, and access issues because intelligent agents are deeply embedded in local economies, hence the proposal for "one country, one strategy."

sentences.en: The ninth point promotes open source and openness, proposing the construction of a high-level China-South Asian Cooperation Center for AI applications, researching export paths for large models and intelligent agents for each country, and building a globally influential open-source community.
sentences.zh: 第九点提倡开源开放，提出建设高水平的中国-南亚人工智能应用合作中心，研究各国大模型、智能体的输出路径，打造具有全球影响力的开源社区。

sentences.en: The intelligent agent era especially needs open source and protocols, as it is inherently interconnected, and the ecological network effect is extremely strong — once a new skill is integrated, all compatible protocol agents may gain this capability, and the more agents there are, the more developers are willing to provide skills, the more skills there are, the more useful agents become.
sentences.zh: 智能代理时代尤其需要开源和协议，因为它本质上是互联的，生态网络效应极其强大——一旦集成了一项新技能，所有兼容协议的代理都可能获得这种能力，而且代理越多，开发者就越愿意提供技能，技能越多，代理就越有用。

sentences.en: Whoever's protocol is widely adopted controls the development entry and ecological voice.
sentences.zh: 谁的协议被广泛采用，谁就控制了开发入口和生态话语权。

sentences.en: The document specifically mentions evaluating open-source contributions, as open source is truly expensive in terms of long-term maintenance and community operations.
sentences.zh: 该文件特别提到了评估开源贡献，因为开源在长期维护和社区运营方面确实非常昂贵。

sentences.en: The export part faces more complex privacy, responsibility, and access issues because intelligent agents are deeply embedded in local economies, hence the proposal for "one country, one strategy."
sentences.zh: 出口部分面临更复杂的隐私、责任和准入问题，因为智能代理深深植根于当地经济，因此提出了“一国一战略”。

blocks.html_en: The tenth point addresses guarantees, coordinating national and municipal fiscal funds, government investment funds, and market-oriented funds to support technical breakthroughs, common platforms, and demonstration applications that meet the criteria. This policy covers a wide range, spilling over from a single technology industry to scientific research, software, manufacturing, consumer goods, entrepreneurship, finance, regulation, talent, and international cooperation. The intelligent agent era represents a direct capability reassessment for every individual and company: most jobs will not disappear overnight, but more realistically, they will be broken down into dozens of tasks, with repetitive, procedural, and easily verifiable parts being taken over by agents first; those who can only complete intermediate steps, cannot judge results, and cannot take responsibility for final delivery will face increasing pressure. Opportunities lie precisely in the redistribution of tasks and the revaluation of capabilities — in the past, it took capital, teams, and complex management to create a company, but now, with a mature agent system, it's possible to start from a very small real task and scale up. However, agents won't automatically bring success — they will only amplify a person's goals, judgments, expertise, and execution system together.

sentences.en: The tenth point addresses guarantees, coordinating national and municipal fiscal funds, government investment funds, and market-oriented funds to support technical breakthroughs, common platforms, and demonstration applications that meet the criteria.
sentences.zh: 第十点是保障，协调国家和市级财政资金、政府投资资金、市场化资金等，支持符合条件的技术攻关、共通平台和示范应用。

sentences.en: This policy covers a wide range, spilling over from a single technology industry to scientific research, software, manufacturing, consumer goods, entrepreneurship, finance, regulation, talent, and international cooperation.
sentences.zh: 这一政策涵盖范围广泛，从单一的科技产业延伸到科研、软件、制造、消费品、创业、金融、监管、人才、国际合作等领域。

sentences.en: The intelligent agent era represents a direct capability reassessment for every individual and company: most jobs will not disappear overnight, but more realistically, they will be broken down into dozens of tasks, with repetitive, procedural, and easily verifiable parts being taken over by agents first; those who can only complete intermediate steps, cannot judge results, and cannot take responsibility for final delivery will face increasing pressure.
sentences.zh: 智能代理时代代表着对每个个人和公司的直接能力重新评估：大多数工作不会在一夜之间消失，但​​更现实的是，它们将被分解为数十个任务，重复性、程序性和易于验证的部分将首先被代理接管；那些只能完成中间步骤、无法判断结果、无法承担最终交付责任的人将面临越来越大的压力。

sentences.en: Opportunities lie precisely in the redistribution of tasks and the revaluation of capabilities — in the past, it took capital, teams, and complex management to create a company, but now, with a mature agent system, it's possible to start from a very small real task and scale up.
sentences.zh: 机会恰恰在于任务的重新分配和能力的重新评估——过去创建公司需要资金、团队和复杂的管理，但现在有了成熟的代理系统，可以从一个很小的实际任务开始，然后规模化。

sentences.en: However, agents won't automatically bring success — they will only amplify a person's goals, judgments, expertise, and execution system together.
sentences.zh: 然而，代理人不会自动带来成功——它们只会放大一个人的目标、判断、专业知识和执行系统。

content_html_zh:
今天在北京实施的一份不太长的政策文件，将一系列最近才出现在学术论文和技术术语中的术语纳入了政府官方文件。 这份《加快北京市智能体发展的若干措施》包括Agentic AI、Harness Engineering、AI OS、FDE、OPC、Token Economy、TaaS、AaaS、RaaS、Token Factory、AIP等十点。 尤其是当“线控工程”被置于第二点时，智能体经济的宏伟蓝图首次在政策层面有了清晰的轮廓。

第一点聚焦基础模型，关键词是“不断提高大模型实际任务完成能力”。 近年来，大型模型基于Benchmark分数进行比较，但当智能体开始工作时，他们往往只收到一个模糊的目标，需要自己完成信息、分解计划、调整工具、阅读反馈、修改路线，直到结果出现。 这里有一个严酷的计算：假设智能体连续执行 100 步，每步准确率为 99%，那么一切正确的概率只有 36.6% 左右；即使准确率提高到99.9%，完成整个过程的几率也只有90.5%左右。 因此，Agent的实用价值更像是一个乘法——模型能力乘以长期可靠性，再乘以环境可操作性，再乘以结果可验证性。 如果其中任何一个接近于零，则总价值也接近于零。 前沿评估也向这个方向转变，比如 METR 的任务完成时间范围，它直接测试智能体独立完成一项原本需要人类专家的任务需要多长时间，这也解释了为什么代码成为智能体第一个爆发的领域：它高度数字化、可回滚、可验证。

第二点将“Harness Engineering”翻译为“Harness Engineering”，需要围绕上下文工程、任务持久化、多智能体协作和系统可扩展性进行优化，以构建共同的基础。 模型提供了潜在的能力，但能否一致地交付取决于整个周围的系统——如何选择上下文、如何调整工具、如何分解任务、如何控制权限、如何存储状态、失败后如何重试以及由谁来验证结果。 这些共同构成了“线束”。 今年4月的一篇论文《Agentic Harness Engineering》表明，保持基础模型不变，只迭代模型外的工具、中间件、长期记忆和可观察系统，十轮后，Terminal-Bench2的Pass@1分数从69.7%提高到77.0%，其他模型家族也有5.1到10.1个百分点的提升，收益主要来自于工具、中间件和长期记忆而不仅仅是改变系统提示符。 政策还提到了技能市场、软件商店、AIP互操作标准——未来，很多软件用户将成为代理商，竞争的不仅仅是App Store排名，还有代理商如何发现他们并使其成为默认技能。

第三点鼓励基于智能代理重构底层架构，核心是“需求智能”。 软件智能分为三层：功能智能为特定节点添加生成按钮；流程智能将固定工作流程中的多个步骤连接起来；需求智能让用户简单说出想要的结果，系统自动确定步骤、调用模型和技能、连接软件、寻求批准，对最终结果承担全部责任。 这体现在“超级软件”的概念上——它的优势不在于拥有更多的功能，而在于跨越现有软件边界、全面理解需求、重新组合分布式能力。 这一点特别提到了FDE（前沿部署工程师）：进入客户现场，分解流程，连接系统，清洗数据，然后将每天的新问题带回到产品中。 五个标准决定基准场景——任务频率、人工成本、数字化水平、结果可验证性和错误可逆性。 这些条件满足得越多，实现实际投资回报率的可能性就越大。 这也解释了为什么政策选择了科学、医疗、教育、政务、制造、文化。

第四点从软件转向终端，要求智能体深度嵌入手机、眼镜、耳机、可穿戴设备、机器人、汽车等领域，推动“芯片、模型、云、终端五合一”。 终端代理需要持续的环境感知、用户状态理解以及长期的上下文记忆，在正确的时间做出决策并通过设备执行。 传感器使他们能够感知世界，设备身份和个人数据帮助他们了解“他们是谁”，而操作系统和执行器使他们能够改变世界。 边缘处理低延迟感知、身份验证、私有数据和频繁的简单任务，而云则管理复杂的规划和推理。 设备到设备的任务状态共享允许一项任务在耳机上开始，在电话上继续，并在汽车或计算机上完成。 该文件还将符合条件的新产品纳入家电以旧换新和智能产品采购计划，直接刺激需求面。

第五点对于老百姓来说是最直接的：支持以OPC（One-Person Company）为代表的创新创业模式。 其背后是企业边界的松动——科斯在1937年解释了公司存在的原因，因为内部协调比反复去市场找人、谈判、签订合同和监督要便宜。 然而，代理同时降低了执行成本和协调成本，使得以前需要多个岗位的知识工作——编写代码、设计、处理客户、回复查询、管理报告——可以由一个人使用多个代理连接起来，从而缩小了企业的最小可行规模。 该政策不仅仅是一句口号，而是从灵活算力、专业孵化、创业引导、科技金融、知识产权、政策咨询、OPC社区、全周期服务站、供需匹配、便捷注册等方面延续，有效将企业内部后端能力转移到社会公共服务层。 对于想要抓住机会的个人来说，他们真正需要的是三项资产：行业判断、客户信任和可重用的代理系统。

第六点讨论Token经济。 代理执行长度、上下文、推理轮次、工具数量和重试不确定的动态任务，因此花费 20 亿代币却没有取得任何成果的情况很常见。 这使得代币适合作为成本计量单位，但很难作为价值货币。 政策在提到Token服务质量评估和计费标准的同时，也鼓励建立基于智能质量、使用量、转换效率的评估体系，并写下了整篇文件中最重的一句话：“鼓励创新主体从Token消耗计费转向价值计费”。 三种商业模式对应三种价值层次：TaaS出售基础Token和推理供给，比价格、速度、稳定性、模型质量； AaaS 将模型、工具和 Harness 打包成有能力的代理，销售一种功能； RaaS 直接销售结果，客户只需关注是否签订了合同、是否固定了代码或是否转换了潜在客户。 越高，离Token越远，越接近客户价值，但RaaS就变得更加困难，因为供应商必须承担任务失败、重复执行、成本波动、质量验收和赔偿的责任。 之后，代理公司应该计算一个新帐户，称为Cost per Success Task（每个成功任务的成本），然后是Value per Success Task（每个成功任务的价值）。 文件还提出，将符合条件的Token新产品纳入中小企业服务券，探索Token券和智能代理服务券，用Token工厂解决供给，用服务券激活需求，按价值计费维持循环。

第七点讨论安全性。 聊天机器人生成内容，但代理获得行动权，能够编辑代码、发起付款、控制设备并代表用户进行通信，从而将风险从“说错话”扩大到“做错事”。 代理安全必须同时解决至少五个问题：对目标的不正确理解、权限越权、即时注入操纵、长期记忆污染以及多个代理之间错误的快速放大。 连接到第三方工具和技能还意味着任何插件或接口故障都可以沿着任务链渗透到核心。 文档的安全措施已从内容审查转向运行时治理；今年5月，国家网信办等部门发布《关于智能体规范应用和创新发展的意见》，提出明确仅限于自身决策、授权决策和自主决策的界限。 分类监管实际上可能有助于行业加速——低风险的任务可以快速测试并上线，而高风险的任务需要严格检查和人工确认。 在这里，安全既是约束，又是市场准入的凭证。

第八点实施“银河计算长廊”工程，针对智能体高频、低时延需求构建新型计算基础设施，推动计算网络与5G-A、6G、F5G融合，挖掘现有算力，通过“零节省、一次性付清”聚合分散算力。 训练大型模型是一个中心化的大工程，但智能体推理就像一个长期运行的生产网络，全天候响应海量任务，负载会因实际业务而大幅波动。 未来的调度不仅涉及GPU，还涉及跨云、跨边、跨端的不同芯片、模型、数据权限、网络状况。 银河计算走廊的价值类似于构建智能生产的计算物流系统，为计算路由、异构调度和边缘计算创造机会。 文件还支持银行和保险机构开发支持智能代理落地的金融产品，因为代理公司早期最有价值的资产是代码、数据和合约，而新时代最重要的新资产被称为“任务轨迹”——目标、计划、行动、观察、纠正和结果的完整链条，可用于训练模型、优化Harness、发现安全漏洞、分析业务流程。

第九点提倡开源开放，提出建设高水平的中国-南亚人工智能应用合作中心，研究各国大模型、智能体的输出路径，打造具有全球影响力的开源社区。 智能代理时代尤其需要开源和协议，因为它本质上是互联的，生态网络效应极其强大——一旦集成了一项新技能，所有兼容协议的代理都可能获得这种能力，而且代理越多，开发者就越愿意提供技能，技能越多，代理就越有用。 谁的协议被广泛采用，谁就控制了开发入口和生态话语权。 该文件特别提到了评估开源贡献，因为开源在长期维护和社区运营方面确实非常昂贵。 出口部分面临更复杂的隐私、责任和准入问题，因为智能代理深深植根于当地经济，因此提出了“一国一战略”。

第十点是保障，协调国家和市级财政资金、政府投资资金、市场化资金等，支持符合条件的技术攻关、共通平台和示范应用。 这一政策涵盖范围广泛，从单一的科技产业延伸到科研、软件、制造、消费品、创业、金融、监管、人才、国际合作等领域。 智能代理时代代表着对每个个人和公司的直接能力重新评估：大多数工作不会在一夜之间消失，但​​更现实的是，它们将被分解为数十个任务，重复性、程序性和易于验证的部分将首先被代理接管；那些只能完成中间步骤、无法判断结果、无法承担最终交付责任的人将面临越来越大的压力。 机会恰恰在于任务的重新分配和能力的重新评估——过去创建公司需要资金、团队和复杂的管理，但现在有了成熟的代理系统，可以从一个很小的实际任务开始，然后规模化。 然而，代理人不会自动带来成功——它们只会放大一个人的目标、判断、专业知识和执行系统。
